title: Block Activators [OUTDATED - READ DESC]
description: Adds in a replica of the Autonomous Activator from Thermal Expansion to Fabric
body:
# NO LONGER BEING UPDATED!
# MERGED INTO THIS MOD: https://modrinth.com/mod/hullabaloo

# What is it?

### This mod adds a replica of the Autonomous Activator from Thermal Expansion to Fabric.

# Changelog (v1.2.2 -> v1.3.0)
- Added support for the Block Activators facing up and down
 
# Versions
- 1.19.2 Fabric
- 1.19.4 Fabric  

There will most likely not be a Forge version (made by me, at least).

# Future Features / Versions
- Tick interval modification (change how often the block activator updates)
 
# Some useful links...
[Wiki](https://gitko01.github.io/blockactivators_wiki/index.html)  
[GitHub](https://github.com/Gitko01/BlockActivators)  
[My website](https://gitko01.github.io)

# Credits
Thanks to the developers of FabricMC and Fake Player API!  
The Autonomous Activator (the entire inspiration for this mod) was NOT made by me, so thanks to the developers of Thermal Expansion who made it!  

Fake Player API for Fabric. -> https://github.com/CafeteriaGuild/fake-player-api
